seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Jimboomba and Jimbour East. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Jimboomba vs Jimbour East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jimboomba and Jimbour East.
heading: Jimboomba vs Jimbour East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jimboomba, Queensland and Jimbour East, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jimbour East has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Jimboomba (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jimboomba or Jimbour East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jimboomba has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Jimbour East scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jimboomba scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Jimbour East scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jimboomba or Jimbour East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jimbour East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
